controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - peer to peer lending platform) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Peer to Peer Lending Platform) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - peer to peer lending platform) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to every non-banking financial company - peer to peer lending platform (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfc-p2ps' and individu
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to every Non-Banking Financial Company - Peer
to Peer Lending Platform (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFC-P2Ps' and
individually as an 'NBFC-P2P') as defined herein and shall provide a framework for the
registration and operation of NBFC-P2Ps in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to every non-banking financial company - peer to peer lending platform (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfc-p2ps' and individu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-p2p: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framework for scale based regu
controls.control_description:
The provisions contained in the following directions, where not contradictory to the
contents of these Directions, shall be applicable to an NBFC-P2P:
(1) Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to an nbfc-p2p: (1) reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framework for scale based regu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-p2p, despite the categorization of nbfc-p2p as nbfcs- bl under sbr framework
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that the provisions of paragraphs 12 and
13 shall be applicable to NBFC-P2P, despite the categorization of NBFC-P2P as NBFCs-
BL under SBR Framework.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be applicable to nbfc-p2p, despite the categorization of nbfc-p2p as nbfcs- bl under sbr framework

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to an nbfc-p2p in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding the above, the instructions contained in these Directions shall be
applicable to an NBFC-P2P in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant
instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph 4 above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to an nbfc-p2p in addition and not in substitution to the other relevant instructions contained in the directions mentioned in paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure always remain in the base layer of the regulatory structure specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exempt
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall always remain in the Base Layer of the regulatory structure
specified in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration,
Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to always remain in the base layer of the regulatory structure specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exempt

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below -- <image> (1) "company" means a company as defined in clause (20) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms used herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below --
<image>
(1) "Company" means a company as defined in clause (20) of section 2 of the
Companies Act, 2013;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below -- <image> (1) "company" means a company as defined in clause (20) of section 2 of the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure the total outside liabilities divided by owned funds, of the nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
(2) "Leverage Ratio" means the Total Outside Liabilities divided by Owned Funds, of
the NBFC-P2P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the total outside liabilities divided by owned funds, of the nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure a loan where interest and / or installment of principal remain overdue for a period of more than 90 days
controls.control_description:
(3) "Non-Performing Asset" (NPA) means a loan where interest and / or installment of
principal remain overdue for a period of more than 90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a loan where interest and / or installment of principal remain overdue for a period of more than 90 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure a person who has entered into an arrangement with an nbfc- p2p to lend on it or to avail of loan facilitation services provided by it
controls.control_description:
(4) "Participant" means a person who has entered into an arrangement with an NBFC-
P2P to lend on it or to avail of loan facilitation services provided by it;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a person who has entered into an arrangement with an nbfc- p2p to lend on it or to avail of loan facilitation services provided by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure include an individual, a body of individuals, a huf, a firm, a society, or any artificial body, whether incorporated or not
controls.control_description:
Explanation: 'Person' shall include an individual, a body of individuals, a HUF, a firm, a
society, or any artificial body, whether incorporated or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include an individual, a body of individuals, a huf, a firm, a society, or any artificial body, whether incorporated or not

controls.control_objective: To ensure an intermediary providing the services of loan facilitation via online medium or otherwise, to the participants as defined at sub- paragraph (4) above
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an intermediary providing the services of loan facilitation via online medium or otherwise, to the participants as defined at sub- paragraph (4) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure a non-banking institution which carries on the business of a peer to peer lending platform
controls.control_description:
(6) "Non-banking financial company - Peer to Peer Lending Platform" (NBFC-P2P)
means a non-banking institution which carries on the business of a Peer to Peer Lending
Platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a non-banking institution which carries on the business of a peer to peer lending platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under those acts
controls.control_description:
Words or expressions used in these Directions but not defined herein and defined in
the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 or in the Companies Act, 2013 shall have the same
meaning as assigned to them under those Acts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under those acts

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place board approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems
controls.control_description:
The NBFC-P2P shall put in place Board approved policies and establish periodic
review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place board approved policies and establish periodic review mechanisms to ensure sound processes and systems

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the business of peer to peer lending platform
controls.control_description:
No non-banking institution other than a company shall undertake the business of Peer
to Peer Lending Platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the business of peer to peer lending platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence or carry on the business of a peer to peer lending platform without obtaining a certificate of registration (cor) from the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
No NBFC-P2P shall commence or carry on the business of a Peer to Peer Lending
Platform without obtaining a Certificate of Registration (CoR) from the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence or carry on the business of a peer to peer lending platform without obtaining a certificate of registration (cor) from the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore or such higher amount as the reserve bank may specify
controls.control_description:
Every company seeking registration with the Reserve Bank as an NBFC-P2P shall
have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore or such higher amount as the
Reserve Bank may specify.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a net owned fund of not less than rupees two crore or such higher amount as the reserve bank may specify

controls.control_objective: To ensure infuse the required net owned fund prior to grant of cor
controls.control_description:
<image>
Explanation: The applicant shall infuse the required net owned fund prior to grant of CoR,
provided, list of promoters and sources of funds for meeting the minimum net owned fund
requirement is furnished at the time of submitting the application.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to infuse the required net owned fund prior to grant of cor

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application for registration, through the pravaah portal, to the department of regulation of the reserve bank, in the form specified by the re
controls.control_description:
Every prospective company seeking registration as an NBFC-P2P shall make an
application for registration, through the PRAVAAH portal, to the Department of Regulation
of the Reserve Bank, in the form specified by the Reserve Bank for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application for registration, through the pravaah portal, to the department of regulation of the reserve bank, in the form specified by the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the following conditions, among others, to be fulfilled: (1) the company is incorporated in india
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the following conditions, among others, to be fulfilled: (1) the company is incorporated in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be served by the grant of cor
controls.control_description: (8) Public interest shall be served by the grant of CoR;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be served by the grant of cor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prejudicial to the public interest
controls.control_description:
(9) Any other condition as may be specified by the Reserve Bank, fulfillment of which,
in the opinion of the Reserve Bank, is necessary to ensure that the commencement of or
carrying on the business in India shall not be prejudicial to the public interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prejudicial to the public interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the conditions specified under paragraph 15 are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for setting up of a peer to peer lending platform
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the conditions specified under
paragraph 15 are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for setting up of a Peer to Peer
Lending Platform, subject to such conditions which it may consider fit to impose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the conditions specified under paragraph 15 are fulfilled, grant in-principle approval for setting up of a peer to peer lending platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place the technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required and report position of compliance with the terms of grant of
controls.control_description:
Within the period of twelve months, the company shall put in place the technology
platform, enter into all other legal documentations required and report position of
compliance with the terms of grant of in-principle approval to the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to put in place the technology platform, enter into all other legal documentations required and report position of compliance with the terms of grant of

controls.control_objective: To ensure , after being satisfied that the entity is ready to commence operations, grant a cor to function as an nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, after being satisfied that the entity is ready to commence
operations, grant a CoR to function as an NBFC-P2P, subject to conditions as deemed
fit by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , after being satisfied that the entity is ready to commence operations, grant a cor to function as an nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure cancel the cor granted to an nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may cancel the CoR granted to an NBFC-P2P, if such company -
(1) ceases to carry on the business of Peer to Peer Lending Platform in India;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cancel the cor granted to an nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - regis
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of the instructions as prescribed in
paragraphs 47 and 48 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 47 and 48 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - regis

controls.control_objective: To ensure - <image> (1) act as an intermediary providing an online marketplace or platform to the participants involved in peer to peer lending
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall -
<image>
(1) act as an intermediary providing an online marketplace or platform to the
participants involved in Peer to Peer lending;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to - <image> (1) act as an intermediary providing an online marketplace or platform to the participants involved in peer to peer lending

controls.control_objective: To ensure assume any credit risk, either directly or indirectly, arising out of transactions carried out on its platform
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P
shall not assume any credit risk, either directly or indirectly, arising out of transactions
carried out on its platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assume any credit risk, either directly or indirectly, arising out of transactions carried out on its platform

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borne by the lenders and adequate disclosures to this effect shall be made to lenders as part of fair practices code specified in paragraphs 45 to
controls.control_description:
In other words, entire loss of principal or interest or both, if any,
in respect of funds lent by lenders to borrowers on the platform shall be borne by the
lenders and adequate disclosures to this effect shall be made to lenders as part of fair
practices code specified in paragraphs 45 to 50 of these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borne by the lenders and adequate disclosures to this effect shall be made to lenders as part of fair practices code specified in paragraphs 45 to

controls.control_objective: To ensure cross sell any insurance product also which is in the nature of credit enhancement or credit guarantee
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cross sell any insurance product also which is in the nature of credit enhancement or credit guarantee

controls.control_objective: To ensure - (1) undertake due diligence on the participants
controls.control_description:
Further, an NBFC-P2P shall-
(1) undertake due diligence on the participants;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to - (1) undertake due diligence on the participants

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake any activity other than those stated in paragraphs 22 and 23 of these directions
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall not undertake any activity other than those stated in paragraphs
22 and 23 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake any activity other than those stated in paragraphs 22 and 23 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted
controls.control_description:
Provided that deployment of investible funds by an NBFC-P2P in instruments
specified by the Reserve Bank, not for trading, shall be permitted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a leverage ratio not exceeding two
controls.control_description: An NBFC-P2P shall maintain a Leverage Ratio not exceeding two.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a leverage ratio not exceeding two

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a cap of ₹50,00,000/- provided that the amount lent by the lenders on nbfc-p2p platforms is consistent with their net-worth
controls.control_description:
The aggregate exposure of a lender to all borrowers at any point of time, across all
NBFC-P2P platforms, shall be subject to a cap of ₹50,00,000/- provided that the amount
lent by the lenders on NBFC-P2P platforms is consistent with their net-worth.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a cap of ₹50,00,000/- provided that the amount lent by the lenders on nbfc-p2p platforms is consistent with their net-worth

controls.control_objective: To ensure produce a certificate to nbfc-p2p platforms from a practicing chartered accountant certifying minimum networth of ₹50,00,000
controls.control_description:
In case, the
amount lent by a lender is more than ₹10,00,000/- across P2P platforms, the lender shall
produce a certificate to NBFC-P2P platforms from a practicing Chartered Accountant
certifying minimum networth of ₹50,00,000.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to produce a certificate to nbfc-p2p platforms from a practicing chartered accountant certifying minimum networth of ₹50,00,000

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a cap of ₹10,00,000/-
controls.control_description:
The aggregate loans taken by a borrower at any point of time, across all NBFC-P2Ps,
shall be subject to a cap of ₹10,00,000/-.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a cap of ₹10,00,000/-

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed ₹50,000/-
controls.control_description:
The exposure of a single lender to the same borrower, across all NBFC-P2Ps, shall
not exceed ₹50,000/-.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed ₹50,000/-

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 36 months
controls.control_description: The maturity of the loans shall not exceed 36 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 36 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain a certificate from the borrower or lender, as applicable, that the limits prescribed above are being adhered to
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall obtain a certificate from the borrower or lender, as applicable,
that the limits prescribed above are being adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain a certificate from the borrower or lender, as applicable, that the limits prescribed above are being adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Prudential Norms on Declaration of Dividends)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of reserve bank of india (non- banking financial companies - prudential norms on declaration of dividends) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy in place - (1) setting out the eligibility criteria for participants on it
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall have a Board approved policy in place -
(1) Setting out the eligibility criteria for participants on it.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy in place - (1) setting out the eligibility criteria for participants on it

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for the actions of its service providers including recovery agents and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the participant
controls.control_description:
The outsourcing of any activity by an NBFC-P2P does not diminish its obligations and
it shall be responsible for the actions of its service providers including recovery agents
and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the participant that is available with the
service providers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for the actions of its service providers including recovery agents and the confidentiality of information pertaining to the participant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be disbursed unless the lenders and the borrowers have been matched / mapped as per the board approved policy framed in terms of sub-paragraph (3) of
controls.control_description:
No loan shall be disbursed unless the lenders and the borrowers have been matched
/ mapped as per the board approved policy framed in terms of sub-paragraph (3) of
paragraph 32, the individual lender(s) have approved the individual recipient(s) of the
loan, and all concerned participants have signed the loan contract.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be disbursed unless the lenders and the borrowers have been matched / mapped as per the board approved policy framed in terms of sub-paragraph (3) of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be objective and the nbfc-p2p shall disclose the fees liable to be charged, ab initio, i
controls.control_description:
The pricing policy shall be objective and the NBFC-P2P shall disclose the fees liable
to be charged, ab initio, i.e., at the time of lending itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be objective and the nbfc-p2p shall disclose the fees liable to be charged, ab initio, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a fixed amount or a fixed proportion of the principal amount involved in the lending transaction
controls.control_description:
The fees shall be a fixed amount
or a fixed proportion of the principal amount involved in the lending transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a fixed amount or a fixed proportion of the principal amount involved in the lending transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be dependent upon the repayment by the borrower(s)
controls.control_description:
The fees
shall not be dependent upon the repayment by the borrower(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be dependent upon the repayment by the borrower(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through escrow account mechanisms which will be operated by a bank promoted trustee
controls.control_description:
Fund transfer between the participants on the Peer to Peer Lending Platform shall be
through escrow account mechanisms which will be operated by a bank promoted trustee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through escrow account mechanisms which will be operated by a bank promoted trustee

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained
controls.control_description:
At least two escrow accounts, one for funds received from lenders and pending disbursal
(i.e., Lenders' escrow Account), and the other for collections from borrowers (i.e.,
Borrowers' escrow Account), shall be maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be transferred to the lenders' escrow account and shall only be disbursed to the specific borrower's bank account after ensuring compliance to th
controls.control_description:
Under these prescribed funds transfer
mechanism, funds from the lenders' bank accounts shall only be transferred to the
Lenders' Escrow Account and shall only be disbursed to the specific borrower's bank
account after ensuring compliance to the paragraph 34 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be transferred to the lenders' escrow account and shall only be disbursed to the specific borrower's bank account after ensuring compliance to th

controls.control_objective: To ensure transfer the amount towards repayment of loan from his bank account to the borrowers' escrow account, from where the funds shall only be transferred t
controls.control_description:
The borrower
shall transfer the amount towards repayment of loan from his bank account to the
Borrowers' Escrow Account, from where the funds shall only be transferred to the
respective lender's bank account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transfer the amount towards repayment of loan from his bank account to the borrowers' escrow account, from where the funds shall only be transferred t

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for repayment of loans and funds from 'borrowers' escrow account' shall not be <image> used for disbursement of loans
controls.control_description:
Funds from 'Lenders' Escrow Account' shall not be
used for repayment of loans and funds from 'Borrowers' Escrow Account' shall not be
<image>
used for disbursement of loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for repayment of loans and funds from 'borrowers' escrow account' shall not be <image> used for disbursement of loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through and from bank accounts and cash transactions are strictly prohibited
controls.control_description:
All fund transfers shall be through and from bank
accounts and cash transactions are strictly prohibited.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through and from bank accounts and cash transactions are strictly prohibited

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adopted by the nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
The mechanism as described in
the Annex I shall be adopted by the NBFC-P2P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adopted by the nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt any suitable mechanism for verifying / identifying the bank accounts of the participants with applicable safeguards, solely to ensure that the a
controls.control_description:
Explanation: An NBFC-P2P may adopt any suitable mechanism for verifying / identifying
the bank accounts of the participants with applicable safeguards, solely to ensure that
the accounts belong to the respective lender or borrower registered on the platform to
adhere to Funds Transfer Mechanism.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt any suitable mechanism for verifying / identifying the bank accounts of the participants with applicable safeguards, solely to ensure that the a

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain responsible for ensuring that such mechanisms are compliant with the provisions of the digital personal data protection act, 2023, and all othe
controls.control_description:
The NBFC-P2P shall remain responsible for
ensuring that such mechanisms are compliant with the provisions of the Digital Personal
Data Protection Act, 2023, and all other applicable laws, guidelines, or instructions issued
by the Reserve Bank or any other competent authority from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain responsible for ensuring that such mechanisms are compliant with the provisions of the digital personal data protection act, 2023, and all othe

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain in these escrow accounts for a period exceeding 't+1' day
controls.control_description:
The funds transferred into the Lenders' Escrow Account and Borrowers' Escrow
Account shall not remain in these Escrow Accounts for a period exceeding 'T+1' day,
where 'T' is the date on which the funds are received in these Escrow Accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain in these escrow accounts for a period exceeding 't+1' day

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered as 't+1' bank working day
controls.control_description:
Explanation: It is clarified that since all fund transfers must be conducted through and
from bank accounts, 'T+1' day shall be considered as 'T+1' bank working day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered as 't+1' bank working day

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the relevant instructions, as applicable, in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit information reporting) di
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the relevant instructions, as applicable, in the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Information Reporting)
Directions, 2025 for reporting and updating the credit information relating to borrower
transactions on the platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the relevant instructions, as applicable, in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - credit information reporting) di

controls.control_objective: To ensure include necessary consents in the agreement with the participants for providing the credit information
controls.control_description:
For the purpose, the NBFC-P2P shall include necessary
consents in the agreement with the participants for providing the credit information.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include necessary consents in the agreement with the participants for providing the credit information

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to disclose the following: (1) to the lender:
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall be required to disclose the following:
(1) to the lender:
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be required to disclose the following: (1) to the lender:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept on record), required amount, interest rate sought, and credit score as arrived by the nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
(i) details about the borrower(s) including personal identity with his / her consent
(which should be kept on record), required amount, interest rate sought, and
credit score as arrived by the NBFC-P2P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept on record), required amount, interest rate sought, and credit score as arrived by the nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include all losses borne by the lenders on principal or interest or both
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that such disclosures
shall also include all losses borne by the lenders on principal or interest or both;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include all losses borne by the lenders on principal or interest or both

controls.control_objective: To ensure also comply with the disclosure requirements specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall also comply with the disclosure requirements specified in
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Financial Statements:
Presentation and Disclosures) Directions, 2025 except paragraphs 13 to 15 and
paragraph 20.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also comply with the disclosure requirements specified in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - financial statements: presentation

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the providing of services to a participant, who has applied for availing of such services, is backed by appropriate agreements between the
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall ensure that the providing of services to a participant, who has
applied for availing of such services, is backed by appropriate agreements between the
participants and the NBFC-P2P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the providing of services to a participant, who has applied for availing of such services, is backed by appropriate agreements between the

controls.control_objective: To ensure categorically specify all the terms and conditions among the borrower, the lender and the nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
The agreements shall categorically specify all the terms
and conditions among the borrower, the lender and the NBFC-P2P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to categorically specify all the terms and conditions among the borrower, the lender and the nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in annualized percentage rate (apr) format
controls.control_description:
The interest rates displayed on the platform shall be in Annualized Percentage Rate
(APR) format.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in annualized percentage rate (apr) format

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly and prominently mention its name (as mentioned in the certificate of registration) along with its brand name
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall explicitly and prominently mention its name (as mentioned in the
Certificate of Registration) along with its brand name, if any, in all its touch points /
customer interfaces including promotional material and any communication with
stakeholders / participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly and prominently mention its name (as mentioned in the certificate of registration) along with its brand name

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a fair practices code, based on the guidelines outlined herein, with the approval of its board
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall put in place a Fair Practices Code, based on the Guidelines
outlined herein, with the approval of its Board.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a fair practices code, based on the guidelines outlined herein, with the approval of its board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put up on its website, for the information of various stakeholders
controls.control_description:
The same should be put up on its website,
for the information of various stakeholders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put up on its website, for the information of various stakeholders

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to obtain explicit declaration from the lenders stating that they have understood all the risks associated with the lending transactions a
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall be required to obtain explicit declaration from the lenders stating
that they have understood all the risks associated with the lending transactions and that
the NBFC-P2P platform does not assure return of principal / payment of interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to obtain explicit declaration from the lenders stating that they have understood all the risks associated with the lending transactions a

controls.control_objective: To ensure also state that there exists a likelihood of loss of entire principal in case of default by a borrower
controls.control_description:
The
declaration shall also state that there exists a likelihood of loss of entire principal in case
of default by a borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also state that there exists a likelihood of loss of entire principal in case of default by a borrower

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide any assurance or guarantee for the recovery of loans
controls.control_description:
The NBFC-P2P platform shall not provide any assurance or
guarantee for the recovery of loans.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide any assurance or guarantee for the recovery of loans

controls.control_objective: To ensure promote peer to peer lending as an investment product with features like tenure linked assured minimum returns, liquidity options, etc
controls.control_description:
Further, the NBFC-P2P platform shall not promote
peer to peer lending as an investment product with features like tenure linked assured
minimum returns, liquidity options, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to promote peer to peer lending as an investment product with features like tenure linked assured minimum returns, liquidity options, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure resort to harassment viz
controls.control_description:
In the matter of recovery of loans, NBFC-P2P shall ensure that the staff are
adequately trained to deal with the participants in an appropriate manner and shall not
resort to harassment viz., persistently bothering the borrowers at odd hours, use of
coercion for recovery of loans, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to resort to harassment viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that any information relating to the participants received by it is not disclosed to any third party without the consent of the participants
controls.control_description:
The NBFC-P2P shall ensure that any information relating to the participants received
by it is not disclosed to any third party without the consent of the participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that any information relating to the participants received by it is not disclosed to any third party without the consent of the participants

controls.control_objective: To ensure also provide for periodic review of the compliance of the fair practices code and the functioning of the grievances redressal mechanism at various lev
controls.control_description:
The Board of Directors shall also provide for periodic review of the compliance of the
Fair Practices Code and the functioning of the grievances redressal mechanism at
various levels of management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also provide for periodic review of the compliance of the fair practices code and the functioning of the grievances redressal mechanism at various lev

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the board at regular intervals, as may be prescribed by it
controls.control_description:
A consolidated report of such reviews shall be submitted
to the Board at regular intervals, as may be prescribed by it.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the board at regular intervals, as may be prescribed by it

controls.control_objective: To ensure display a caveat prominently on its website, mobile/web applications including any other promotional material used by it that "it is an nbfc-p2p lendi
controls.control_description:
The platform shall display a caveat prominently on its website, mobile/web
applications including any other promotional material used by it that "It is an NBFC-P2P
lending platform registered with the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display a caveat prominently on its website, mobile/web applications including any other promotional material used by it that "it is an nbfc-p2p lendi

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved policy to address participant grievances / complaints
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall put in place a Board approved policy to address participant
grievances / complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board approved policy to address participant grievances / complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure be handled / disposed of by the nbfc-p2p <image> within such time and in such manner as provided for in its board approved policy, but in any case, no
controls.control_description:
Complaints shall be handled / disposed of by the NBFC-P2P
<image>
within such time and in such manner as provided for in its Board approved policy, but in
any case, not beyond a period of one month from the date of receipt.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be handled / disposed of by the nbfc-p2p <image> within such time and in such manner as provided for in its board approved policy, but in any case, no

controls.control_objective: To ensure display the following information prominently, for the benefit of participants, on the website: (1) the name and contact details (telephone / mobile n
controls.control_description:
At the operational level, the NBFC-P2P shall display the following information
prominently, for the benefit of participants, on the website:
(1) the name and contact details (Telephone / Mobile Nos.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to display the following information prominently, for the benefit of participants, on the website: (1) the name and contact details (telephone / mobile n

controls.control_objective: To ensure appeal to the customer education and protection department of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(2) that if the complaint / dispute is not redressed within a period of one month, the
participant may appeal to the Customer Education and Protection Department of the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appeal to the customer education and protection department of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the directions provided under the said scheme
controls.control_description:
NBFCs covered under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, 2021
(RBIOS, 2021) shall comply with the directions provided under the said Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the directions provided under the said scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be primarily information technology (it) driven
controls.control_description: Business of an NBFC-P2P shall be primarily Information Technology (IT) driven.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be primarily information technology (it) driven

controls.control_objective: To ensure be scalable to handle growth in business
controls.control_description:
The
technology should be scalable to handle growth in business.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be scalable to handle growth in business

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adequate safeguards built in its it systems to ensure that it is protected against unauthorized access, alteration, destruction, disclosure or diss
controls.control_description:
There should be adequate safeguards built in its IT systems to ensure that it is
protected against unauthorized access, alteration, destruction, disclosure or
dissemination of records and data.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adequate safeguards built in its it systems to ensure that it is protected against unauthorized access, alteration, destruction, disclosure or diss

controls.control_objective: To ensure from time to time, prescribe technical specifications, as deemed fit
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may from time to time, prescribe
technical specifications, as deemed fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to from time to time, prescribe technical specifications, as deemed fit

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved business continuity plan in place for safekeeping of information and documents and servicing of loans for full tenure in case of
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P should have a Board approved Business Continuity Plan in place for
safekeeping of information and documents and servicing of loans for full tenure in case
of closure of platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a board approved business continuity plan in place for safekeeping of information and documents and servicing of loans for full tenure in case of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in place and shall be conducted at least once in two years by cisa certified external auditors
controls.control_description:
Information System Audit of the internal systems and processes shall be in place and
shall be conducted at least once in two years by CISA certified external auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in place and shall be conducted at least once in two years by cisa certified external auditors

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the regional office of the department of supervision of the reserve bank, under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the nbfc-p
controls.control_description:
Report
of the external auditor shall be submitted to the Regional Office of the Department of
Supervision of the Reserve Bank, under whose jurisdiction the Registered Office of the
NBFC-P2P is located, within one month of submission of the report by the external
auditor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the regional office of the department of supervision of the reserve bank, under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the nbfc-p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reasonable arrangements in place to ensure that loan agreements facilitated on the platform will continue to be managed and administered by a third party in accordance with the contract terms
controls.control_description:
There shall be reasonable arrangements in place to ensure that loan agreements
facilitated on the platform will continue to be managed and administered by a third party
in accordance with the contract terms, if the NBFC-P2P ceases to carry on the business
of a Peer to Peer Lending Platform.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reasonable arrangements in place to ensure that loan agreements facilitated on the platform will continue to be managed and administered by a third party in accordance with the contract terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with master direction on information technology governance, risk, controls and assurance practices dated november 07, 2023 (as amended from tim
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with Master Direction on Information Technology
Governance, Risk, Controls and Assurance Practices dated November 07, 2023 (as
amended from time to time).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with master direction on information technology governance, risk, controls and assurance practices dated november 07, 2023 (as amended from tim

controls.control_objective: To ensure make use of the 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P may make use of the 'Guidance Note on Operational Risk
Management and Operational Resilience', as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make use of the 'guidance note on operational risk management and operational resilience', as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of paragraphs 12 and 13 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 in this re
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of paragraphs 12 and 13 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025 in this
regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of paragraphs 12 and 13 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 in this re

controls.control_objective: To ensure reach the regional office of the department of supervision of the reserve bank under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the nbfc-p2p is locat
controls.control_description:
The statement
must reach the Regional Office of the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank
under whose jurisdiction the Registered Office of the NBFC-P2P is located, within 15 days
of the change.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reach the regional office of the department of supervision of the reserve bank under whose jurisdiction the registered office of the nbfc-p2p is locat

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted by the ceo of the nbfc-p2p to the said regional office, giving the names of its directors for the quarter ending on march 31, which shoul
controls.control_description:
An annual statement shall be submitted by the CEO of the NBFC-P2P to
the said Regional Office, giving the names of its Directors for the quarter ending on March
31, which should be certified by the auditors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted by the ceo of the nbfc-p2p to the said regional office, giving the names of its directors for the quarter ending on march 31, which shoul

controls.control_objective: To ensure remove the concerned director/s, on being advised by the reserve bank to do so
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank, if it deems fit and in public interest, may independently assess
whether the directors are, individually or collectively, fit and proper and the NBFC-P2P
shall remove the concerned director/s, on being advised by the Reserve Bank to do so.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remove the concerned director/s, on being advised by the reserve bank to do so

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of paragraph 8 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 in this regard
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of paragraph 8 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025 in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of paragraph 8 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 in this regard
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of paragraph 9 of Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance) Directions, 2025 in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of paragraph 9 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025 in this regard

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of paragraphs 6(1) and 6(2) of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholding <image>
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of paragraphs 6(1) and 6(2) of
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Acquisition of Shareholding
<image>
or Control) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of paragraphs 6(1) and 6(2) of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholding <image>

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required for - (1) any allotment of shares which will take the aggregate holding of an individual or group to equivalent of 26 per cent and more of
controls.control_description:
Further, prior written permission of the Reserve Bank shall
be required for -
(1) any allotment of shares which will take the aggregate holding of an individual or
group to equivalent of 26 per cent and more of the paid-up capital of the NBFC-P2P;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required for - (1) any allotment of shares which will take the aggregate holding of an individual or group to equivalent of 26 per cent and more of

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 7 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholding or c
controls.control_description:
In respect of prior approval as per requirement in paragraphs 67(1) and 67(2) above,
an NBFC-P2P shall comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 7 of Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Acquisition of Shareholding or
Control) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 7 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholding or c

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 11 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
In respect of prior approval as per requirement in paragraph
67(3) above, an NBFC-P2P shall comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph
11 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Governance)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraph 11 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - governance) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 8 to 10 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholdi
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 8 to 10
of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Acquisition of
Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 8 to 10 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of shareholdi

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc
controls.control_description:
Every NBFC-P2P shall communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc., as
prescribed in paragraphs 6 and 7 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate change of address, directors, auditors, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 11 to 13 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall ensure compliance to the instructions as prescribed in
paragraphs 11 to 13 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Acquisition of Shareholding or Control) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance to the instructions as prescribed in paragraphs 11 to 13 of reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acquisition of

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct a self-assessment of their existing outsourcing arrangements and bring these in line with the directions contained in reserve bank of india (n
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall conduct a self-assessment of their existing outsourcing
arrangements and bring these in line with the directions contained in Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Managing Risks in Outsourcing) Directions,
2025 and paragraphs 98 to 100 of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct a self-assessment of their existing outsourcing arrangements and bring these in line with the directions contained in reserve bank of india (n

controls.control_objective: To ensure outsource pricing of services / fees to be charged to borrowers / lenders
controls.control_description:
Additionally, NBFC-P2P
shall not outsource pricing of services / fees to be charged to borrowers / lenders.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to outsource pricing of services / fees to be charged to borrowers / lenders

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the provisions of paragraphs 14 and 15 of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-P2P shall comply with the provisions of paragraphs 14 and 15 of the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions,
2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the provisions of paragraphs 14 and 15 of the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure , from time to time, prescribe return/s to be submitted by nbfc-p2p, as it deems fit
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, from time to time, prescribe return/s to be submitted by
NBFC-P2P, as it deems fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , from time to time, prescribe return/s to be submitted by nbfc-p2p, as it deems fit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the aforesaid regional office within 15 days after the quarter to which these relate: (1) a statement, showing the number and amount i
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the aforesaid regional office within 15 days after the quarter to which these relate: (1) a statement, showing the number and amount i

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at any time, cause an inspection by one or more of its officers or employees, or by any other agency as reserve bank may deem fit, of any nbfc-p2p
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank may, at any time, cause an inspection by one or more of its officers
or employees, or by any other agency as Reserve Bank may deem fit, of any NBFC-P2P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at any time, cause an inspection by one or more of its officers or employees, or by any other agency as reserve bank may deem fit, of any nbfc-p2p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be referred to the reserve bank and the decision of the reserve bank shall be final
controls.control_description:
If any question arises relating to the interpretation of these Directions, the matter shall
be referred to the Reserve Bank and the decision of the Reserve Bank shall be final.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be referred to the reserve bank and the decision of the reserve bank shall be final

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and guidelines repealed prior to the
issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced and
any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
<image>
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
